languages.text: Человеческие кости настолько древние, что рассыпаются в руках. Однако интереснее то, что они частично обожжены — словно бы от попадания энергетического оружия уже после того, как плоть сгнила.

The human bones are so ancient that they crumble in your hands. Of greater interest, however, is the fact that they are partially burned, as if they were hit by an energy weapon after the flesh had already rotted away.
languages.original_text: Человеческие кости настолько древние, что рассыпаются в руках. Однако интереснее то, что они частично обожжены — словно бы от попадания энергетического оружия уже после того, как плоть сгнила.

traits.locale_text: The human bones are so ancient that they crumble in your hands. Of greater interest, however, is the fact that they are partially burned, as if they were hit by an energy weapon after the flesh had already rotted away.

The human bones are so ancient that they crumble in your hands. Of greater interest, however, is the fact that they are partially burned, as if they were hit by an energy weapon after the flesh had already rotted away.

languages.text: 骨は非常に古いもので、手に取ると崩れてしまう。しかし、もっと興味深いのは、骨の一部が燃えていることだ。肉が腐敗した後、エネルギー兵器に打たれたのかもしれない。
languages.original_text: The human bones are so ancient that they crumble in your hands. Of greater interest, however, is the fact that they are partially burned, as if they were hit by an energy weapon after the flesh had already rotted away.

traits.locale_text: 骨は非常に古いもので、手に取ると崩れてしまう。しかし、もっと興味深いのは、骨の一部が燃えていることだ。肉が腐敗した後、エネルギー兵器に打たれたのかもしれない。

languages.text: İnsan kemikleri o kadar eski ki elinde ufalanıyor. Daha ilginç olansa sanki etleri çürüyüp gittikten sonra bir enerji silahıyla vurulmuş gibi kısmen yanmış olmaları.
languages.original_text: The human bones are so ancient that they crumble in your hands. Of greater interest, however, is the fact that they are partially burned, as if they were hit by an energy weapon after the flesh had already rotted away.

traits.locale_text: İnsan kemikleri o kadar eski ki elinde ufalanıyor. Daha ilginç olansa sanki etleri çürüyüp gittikten sonra bir enerji silahıyla vurulmuş gibi kısmen yanmış olmaları.

languages.text: Los huesos humanos son tan viejos que se deshacen al tocarlos. Pero lo que más interés te suscita es el hecho de que estén parcialmente quemados, como si hubiesen sido alcanzados por un arma de energía después de que la carne descompuesta se hubiese desprendido de ellos.
languages.original_text: The human bones are so ancient that they crumble in your hands. Of greater interest, however, is the fact that they are partially burned, as if they were hit by an energy weapon after the flesh had already rotted away.

traits.locale_text: Los huesos humanos son tan viejos que se deshacen al tocarlos. Pero lo que más interés te suscita es el hecho de que estén parcialmente quemados, como si hubiesen sido alcanzados por un arma de energía después de que la carne descompuesta se hubiese desprendido de ellos.

languages.text: 这些人类遗骨如此古老，以至在你手中碎裂成屑。然而，更蹊跷的是，部分骨骼存在焦痕，仿佛血肉腐烂之后仍被能量武器击中过。
languages.original_text: The human bones are so ancient that they crumble in your hands. Of greater interest, however, is the fact that they are partially burned, as if they were hit by an energy weapon after the flesh had already rotted away.

traits.locale_text: 这些人类遗骨如此古老，以至在你手中碎裂成屑。然而，更蹊跷的是，部分骨骼存在焦痕，仿佛血肉腐烂之后仍被能量武器击中过。

languages.text: Les ossements humains sont si vieux qu'ils s'effritent entre vos doigts. En revanche, vous remarquez avec intérêt qu'ils sont partiellement brûlés, comme s'ils avaient été frappés par une arme énergétique après décomposition totale de la chair qui les recouvrait.
languages.original_text: The human bones are so ancient that they crumble in your hands. Of greater interest, however, is the fact that they are partially burned, as if they were hit by an energy weapon after the flesh had already rotted away.

traits.locale_text: Les ossements humains sont si vieux qu'ils s'effritent entre vos doigts. En revanche, vous remarquez avec intérêt qu'ils sont partiellement brûlés, comme s'ils avaient été frappés par une arme énergétique après décomposition totale de la chair qui les recouvrait.

languages.text: Die menschlichen Knochen sind so alt, dass sie in deinen Händen zu Staub zerfallen. Noch interessanter ist allerdings der Umstand, dass sie teilweise verbrannt sind, als wären sie von einer Energiewaffe getroffen worden, nachdem das Fleisch längst verrottet war.
languages.original_text: The human bones are so ancient that they crumble in your hands. Of greater interest, however, is the fact that they are partially burned, as if they were hit by an energy weapon after the flesh had already rotted away.

traits.locale_text: Die menschlichen Knochen sind so alt, dass sie in deinen Händen zu Staub zerfallen. Noch interessanter ist allerdings der Umstand, dass sie teilweise verbrannt sind, als wären sie von einer Energiewaffe getroffen worden, nachdem das Fleisch längst verrottet war.
